scores.correctness_notes: The response is broadly correct. The gold standard mentions v1/v2, and the agent uses v2 which is valid. IngressPerAppRequirer is confirmed to exist. The charmcraft.yaml setup and event-handler pattern are accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer, on.ready/on.revoked events, and self.ingress.url all exist in the real traefik-k8s library. However, some constructor parameters (strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme) and the method provide_ingress_requirements(port=...) may not exist with exactly those names/signatures, introducing minor uncertainty.
